chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P No. S-20 of 2026 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection-A. 2. For hearing of main case. 09-03-2026 Mr. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, Advocate a/w petitioner. Mr. Munawar Ali Abbasi, Astt. A.G..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Respondents No.3 and 4 have filed their comments through learned AAG, which are taken on record. In their comments, they have stated that neither have they harassed the petitioner nor they intend to do so in future. Learned AAG submits that the official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law. Learned counsel for the petitioner, after going through the comments filed on behalf of the official respondents, seeks disposal of the instant petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of with the direction to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law and not to cause any harassment to the petitioner. They shall also provide legal protection to the petitioner as and when required, in accordance with law. Judge S.Ashfaq
